project_type: Single-file HTML application for Danish electrical dimensioning (life-safety critical)
language: JavaScript (ES5/ES6 mix inside a single HTML file)
build_system: None - single HTML file with inline CSS and JS. No bundler.
test_framework: Custom headless test runner using Node.js assert module (test-sld.js). Pattern: eval extracted <script> from HTML, mock DOM, run test() functions.
verification_instructions: Run 'node test-sld.js' and confirm all tests pass (currently 110, will add 40-50 more). Verify no syntax errors in JS by successful eval.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - just needs Node.js to run tests
environment_constraints: Sandbox environment. No external network. Node.js available for testing.
contribution_requirements: Click-only UI (NO text input fields). All calculations cite DS/HD 60364. Conservative calculations always. CE-marked components. Trilingual (da/en/fa with RTL). Life-safety critical.

key_patterns.module_registration: Add module key to T.da.modules, T.en.modules, T.fa.modules objects, add case in renderModule() switch, create renderXxx() function
key_patterns.translation: tx(danish_string, english_string) function - falls back to English if FA translation not in _FA dict. Also t(key) for structured translations.
key_patterns.state_management: Global state variables (var xxxState = {...}), mutated by onclick handlers
key_patterns.rendering: Functions return HTML strings, no React/Vue. String concatenation with template literals or + operator.
key_patterns.test_pattern: test(name, fn) with assert. Section headers with console.log. Tests verify function existence, calculation correctness, and HTML output properties.
key_patterns.ui_pattern: Cards with .card class, .result-box for results, .sel-btn for buttons, sliders via <input type='range'>, dropdowns via custom button grids

directory_structure: Flat - single HTML file at root with test file. All code inline in HTML.
